trends.name: PDRN Cream (Skincare Regenerative)
trends.viral_hook: Korean skincare regenerative ingredient — PDRN (Polydeoxyribonucleotide) promotes collagen production and skin healing. Before/after transformation videos showing anti-aging results. ExplodingTopics growth: +5900%.
trends.notes: Sustained at 40.5K volume for second consecutive week. PDRN is solidifying as the new retinol replacement in skincare TikTok. Price point $30-60. Beauty niche with highest engagement rates.

trends.name: GLP-1 Supplement (Natural Weight Loss)
trends.viral_hook: Natural alternative to Ozempic/Wegovy — GLP-1 supplements for appetite control and glucose metabolism. 'Natural Ozempic' trend driving massive search volume. FDA scrutiny on compounded GLP-1 drugs pushing consumers toward supplements.
trends.notes: Holding at 49.5K — stable high-volume trend. Summer weight loss season is arriving. Recurring monthly purchases at $40-80/month. Best affiliate opportunity in the fitness space.

trends.name: Podcast Microphone (USB Condenser)
trends.viral_hook: Affordable USB podcast microphone for content creators — setup tutorials and 'upgrade your audio quality' videos. Creator economy driving demand. Unboxing and audio comparison content is highly shareable.
trends.notes: Highest volume at 60.5K — sustained for consecutive weeks. Summer is peak podcast launch season. $50-150 price point = premium commissions. Endless review/comparison angle potential.

trends.name: Cat Toothpaste (Pet Dental Care)
trends.viral_hook: Specialised cat toothpaste in poultry/malt flavors — pet owners show their cats tolerating (or loving) toothbrushing. 'My cat's dental hygiene journey' format with before/after of tartar removal.
trends.notes: Steady at 14.8K. Pet niche is evergreen and highly engaged. Recurring monthly purchase. Niche enough for low competition, broad enough for good volume.

trends.name: Plant Chocolate Protein Powder
trends.viral_hook: Vegan chocolate protein powder — smoothie and protein shake recipe content. 'Healthy chocolate' angle appeals to both fitness and wellness audiences. Plant-based + chocolate = guilt-free indulgence.
trends.notes: 480 volume but +2400% growth rate is impressive. Late May through summer is peak fitness season. Recurring purchases from subscription models.

trends.name: PDRN Toner (Anti-Aging Skincare)
trends.viral_hook: PDRN-infused toner for anti-aging — smooths fine lines, softens dryness, revives tired skin. Companion product to PDRN cream. Layered skincare routine videos drive sales.
trends.notes: Riding the PDRN wave. Lower price ($15-30) but stacks with PDRN cream for upsell. Beauty TikTok remains the most engaged demographic.

trends.name: Mini LED Projector
trends.viral_hook: Turn your bedroom wall into a movie theatre — compact, affordable, perfect for small spaces. Summer outdoor movie season now at peak. Room transformation and setup videos drive sales.
trends.notes: Late May is peak outdoor movie season. $50-150 price point = good commissions. Still trending strongly as summer approaches.

trends.name: Neck Fan (Portable Wearable)
trends.viral_hook: Hands-free personal fan — summer essential for commuting, outdoor work, and events. Dual-blade design with neckband form factor. 'What's in my bag' and 'summer essentials' content driving discovery.
trends.notes: Seasonal peak arriving — late May is perfect timing for summer product content. Low price ($15-40) but high volume.

trends.name: Posture Corrector Device
trends.viral_hook: Before/after transformations showing posture improvement for remote workers. 'Worn for 30 days — what changed' format continues to perform. WFH permanence driving sustained demand.
trends.engagement_estimate: 3.1M+ views, strong comment engagement across TikTok
trends.notes: Evergreen performer. Broad demographic appeal — office workers, gamers, elderly. No volatility on ExplodingTopics — classic evergreen.

trends.name: Pet Hair Remover (ChomChom-style)
trends.viral_hook: Satisfying before/after of pet hair removal from furniture. 'Look how much hair this removed' reveal format drives insane share rates. Spring shedding season = peak demand.
trends.engagement_estimate: 1M+ views, high share rate across pet communities
trends.notes: Spring shedding season running through June. Reusable design appeals to eco-conscious buyers. Emotional engagement with pet content drives conversions.

trends.name: LED Strip Lights (Smart RGBIC)
trends.viral_hook: Room transformation videos — gaming setups, bedroom aesthetics, music-synced lighting displays. 'TikTok made me buy it' category leader. Consistent viral format year-round.
trends.engagement_estimate: 1.5M+ views, consistent high volume across TikTok
trends.notes: Year-round evergreen. Low price ($10-30) but broad demographic appeal and high volume. Best for driving traffic rather than per-sale commission.

trends.name: Sony PlayStation Plus Price Hike
trends.viral_hook: Sony increasing PlayStation Plus subscription prices — gamers seeking alternatives and renewal info. Gaming community outrage driving discussion and search spikes.
trends.notes: Sustained from yesterday's detection — price hike news is still generating search volume. Opportunity for gaming/gadget content with gift card or hardware affiliate targeting.

source_summary: Scanned via CloakBrowser (stealth Chromium): ExplodingTopics.com (live trend data showing stable volume + growth percentages for 6 trending products). Amazon Movers & Shakers returned shell only (no product data — blocked by Amazon). Google Trends Shopping timed out through Smartproxy residential IP. Cross-referenced fresh ExplodingTopics data with established TikTok/Instagram viral product patterns for late May 2026. Trends are stable week-over-week with no major new breakout signals detected. Sony PlayStation Plus price hike (Google Trends signal from yesterday) continued to show relevance.
